network.title: Network diagnostics
network.harCaptured: HAR-style summary captured from browser traffic.

sourceMapping.title: Source mapping hints
sourceMapping.summary: These browser-side source hints can help trace the failure back to the frontend bundle or route.

reproduction.missingUrl: Provide a page URL to let Debug capture browser evidence automatically.
reproduction.bridgeOnly: No browser bridge is ready for automatic capture on this machine. Connect Chrome DevTools MCP or enable the built-in Browser tool.
reproduction.captureFailed: Automatic browser evidence capture failed. Check the page URL and browser availability.
reproduction.captured: Browser evidence was captured from the target page.

switchToDebug.title: Switch to Debug mode
switchToDebug.description: Switch the active Simple workflow to Debug mode for evidence-driven troubleshooting.

collectBrowserEvidence.title: Collect browser evidence
collectBrowserEvidence.description: Capture browser console, network, DOM, and source-map hints for the active debug case.

approvePatch.title: Approve debug patch
approvePatch.description: Approve the current debug patch proposal and continue into patching.
approvePatch.failure: Failed to approve the debug patch

refreshAnalysis.title: Refresh debug analysis
refreshAnalysis.description: Recompute hypotheses, root cause, and patch proposal from the current debug evidence.

rejectPatch.title: Request another debug patch
rejectPatch.description: Reject the current debug patch proposal and ask for another fix candidate.
rejectPatch.failure: Failed to reject the debug patch

runVerification.title: Run debug verification
runVerification.description: Re-run verification for the active debug case and refresh the verification card.

bridgeNotes.devtoolsConnected: Chrome DevTools MCP is connected and Debug can invoke its tools directly.
bridgeNotes.installedNotConnected: Chrome DevTools MCP is installed for this workspace but not connected.
bridgeNotes.catalogAvailable: Chrome DevTools MCP is available in the built-in MCP catalog but not installed for this workspace.
bridgeNotes.builtinFallback: The built-in Browser tool remains available as an automatic fallback.
